settings.text: TermBars fasten BlueTex tight to purlins and girts for a clean finished surface.
EasyClips are for C/Z purlins and girts in red iron buildings.
Fasteners and spacers should be chosen based on the install method.

settings.heading: TermBars
settings.text: Pairs with BlueTex Pro and Supreme rolls.

settings.heading: EasyClips
settings.text: Useful on C/Z framing.

settings.heading: Fastening
settings.text: Keeps the system tight.

settings.heading: Quote Help
settings.text: Ask for help estimating quantities.

settings.heading: Completing the system
settings.text: Use these parts when BlueTex material needs mechanical attachment, spacing, or fastening support.

settings.heading: Guessing quantities
settings.text: Part counts depend on building dimensions, spacing, and attachment method.

settings.heading: Rolls and tape
settings.text: Most parts are used with BlueTex rolls and seam tape.

settings.heading: Is This Right For Me?
settings.text: Use system parts to attach, space, or finish the BlueTex install.

settings.heading: About 75 bars
settings.text: Roughly 75 bars per 700 sq ft roll of 50" 2mm Pro.

settings.heading: About 1 per 10 sq ft
settings.text: Plan about one clip per 10 sq ft, or every 24" on 5 ft spans.

settings.heading: Follow guidance
settings.text: Use product description guidance and the attachment method.

settings.heading: Assembly-specific
settings.text: Use when airspace or thermal break is part of the assembly.

settings.heading: How Many Do I Need?
settings.text: Use these defaults as editable starting points. Project layout always matters.

settings.heading: BlueTex™ Pro 2mm 50" Wide
settings.text: Common roll material used with TermBars, clips, and fasteners.

settings.heading: BlueTex™ Supreme 6mm 50" Wide
settings.text: Thicker roll option when the project calls for more body.

settings.heading: 3" White Vapor Barrier Seam Tape
settings.text: Seals seams after the material is fastened.

settings.heading: BlueTex™ Cover/Repair System Sample Box
settings.text: Test the full system before ordering parts for a larger project.

settings.heading: What Usually Goes With This
settings.text: System parts are most useful when paired with the matching roll, tape, and attachment method.

settings.heading: What it does
settings.text: TermBars, EasyClips, screws, washers, and spacers each solve a different attachment or assembly problem in a BlueTex metal building install.

settings.heading: Install notes
settings.text: Locate the framing, set the part according to the system layout, and keep the BlueTex material tight and straight.

settings.heading: FAQ
settings.text: Ask for a material list when part counts are unclear or the project includes multiple walls, rooflines, or attachment methods.

settings.heading: Details
settings.text: System part details and quantity notes are available below.
